name: Crab Rangoon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crabmeat, cream cheese, A-1 sauce, and garlic powder in a medium bowl and blend until smooth.
2. Place a heaping teaspoon of the mixture on each wonton wrapper.
3. Moisten the edges of each wonton with the beaten egg yolk.
4. Gather the four corners of the wonton together at the top and pinch the edges to seal them tightly.
5. Heat oil in a deep frying pan or pot to 375°F (190°C).
6. Carefully add the wontons to the hot oil in batches, ensuring they do not overcrowd the pan.
7. Fry the wontons until golden brown, about 3 minutes per batch.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried wontons from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve hot with Chinese mustard and red sauce for dipping (if desired).
